alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices and Services with two promotions, scaling global commercial operations and transformation programs; experience developing teams and cross-functional leadership.
alignments.job_requirement: Build and lead a high-performing team of Account Executives

alignments.candidate_evidence: Proven scaling of commercial operations, managing forecasting and reporting cadence; advanced Excel/Sheets; Looker and Tableau dashboarding; SQL proficiency for data pulling and shaping.
alignments.job_requirement: Strong operational rigor in pipeline management, forecasting, and sales metrics

alignments.candidate_evidence: Product Operations and transformation background; owns evaluation methodology and benchmarking for LLM coding agents; experience translating technical requirements and driving stakeholder alignment.
alignments.job_requirement: Partner with technical teams to enable credible conversations about AI applications with engineering leaders and CTOs

alignments.candidate_evidence: Directs LLM coding agents to build production systems; designs and specs agentic tooling with evaluation methodology; owns benchmarking and calibration; cross-functional engineering partnerships at scale.
alignments.job_requirement: Work closely with Applied AI Engineering teams to demonstrate technical capabilities and optimise solutions post-sales

alignments.candidate_evidence: Global commercial operations experience; transformation program leadership; cross-functional partnership and stakeholder management at Google scale.
alignments.job_requirement: Excellent communication skills and ability to build relationships across all levels, from individual engineers to C-suite executives

alignments.candidate_evidence: No direct evidence of developer-led, product-led, or SaaS/API-first buying-cycle experience; background is primarily internal Devices operations and product transformation, not enterprise software sales or GTM.
alignments.job_requirement: Deep understanding of how digital-native companies evaluate and adopt new technologies, including developer-led and product-led buying motions

gaps.gap: No quota-carrying sales or AE team-leadership experience; background is internal Devices operations and product transformation, not enterprise software sales.
gaps.mitigation: Candidate would require significant onboarding in sales methodology, AE coaching, and developer/SaaS buying cycles. Transferable leadership and operational rigor are present, but functional domain is substantially different.

gaps.gap: Limited exposure to developer-led, product-led, or SaaS/API-first buying motions; candidate's experience is product-internal and transformation-focused, not customer-facing enterprise sales.
gaps.mitigation: Sales enablement and close partnership with GTM and Applied AI teams could accelerate domain learning, but the role assumes existing familiarity with these customer segments.

gaps.gap: No demonstrated recruiting, hiring, or AE ramp-acceleration experience; team development is inferred from scale and transformation work, not hands-on people management in sales.
gaps.mitigation: Candidate's cross-functional leadership and promotion history suggest capability to learn AE coaching, but sales-specific mentorship track record is absent.

gaps.gap: No stated passion for or deep knowledge of AI technology application in customer workflows; background is internal agentic tooling and product specs, not customer-facing AI deployment.
gaps.mitigation: Candidate's agentic tooling ownership and benchmarking work provide relevant AI acumen for technical conversations, but direct customer-facing AI sales or implementation experience is lacking.

output.level_rationale: Sales Manager role requires 10+ years enterprise sales experience and 5+ years sales leadership with team-building and coaching emphasis. Title and people-leadership responsibility anchor to L5. company stage not stated in JD. Base salary (£280–330k) supports mid-to-senior IC or manager level. No director-equivalent language or manager-of-managers scope present.
output.summary: Candidate brings eight years of scaling global commercial operations, team development, advanced analytics, and cross-functional partnership at Google. However, this is a quota-carrying sales-management role with core responsibilities in team sales leadership, enterprise software sales cycles, and developer/SaaS/API-first buying motions—a domain outside the candidate's Product Operations and internal transformation background. No demonstrable experience selling into technology companies, managing AE teams, or navigating developer-led or product-led buying cycles.
uncertainties: Candidate's Commercial Operations background may translate to Revenue Operations in a B2B SaaS/enterprise context, but this role is fundamentally enterprise quota-carrying sales management with AE team leadership—a functional shift, not a domain translation.
No stated experience recruiting, hiring, coaching, or scaling AE teams.
No evidence of enterprise software sales cycle experience, SaaS GTM, or API-first/developer-first customer motion exposure.
Company stage and existing team maturity not specified in JD, limiting clarity on onboarding risk.
